title: xo project identity
description: Single-row identity for this cowork folder. Written once on first boot; immutable thereafter (except `name` which the user may rename).

$schema.description: Editor hint — points at this schema file.

_template.description: Present and true on a fresh template. The first agent to boot must populate identity fields and remove this flag.

pid.description: UUID v4. Generated once on first boot. Never regenerated.

name.description: Human-readable project name. Defaults to the folder name.

owner_user_id.description: Stable user identifier of the project owner.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of first boot.

category.description: Optional MANUAL environment-cluster override set by the user (app|ops|wiki|docs|customer; legacy 'marketing' aliases to customer). Wins over classification.category everywhere. Never written by the watcher.

classification.description: Watcher-maintained (sinks/classification.py): the project's computed environment cluster, folder archetype, and XO data-type tallies. Graphs load from this instead of re-walking the tree.

categories.description: Every cluster the project belongs to, primary first. A project can satisfy several cluster predicates at once.

signals.description: Raw classifier signals (iac, contract, images, has_slides, docs_site).

facts.description: Root-folder facts for the detail panel (name, language, title, excerpt, ...).
